Bash(powershell.exe -Command "$src = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\antvervoort\\\\website-variant\\\\src\\\\assets\\\\aidec-logo.png'; $dst = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\antvervoort\\\\website-variant\\\\src\\\\assets\\\\aidec-logo-opt.png'; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($src\); $w = 900; $h = [int]\($img.Height * $w / $img.Width\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($w, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.InterpolationMode = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.InterpolationMode]::HighQualityBicubic; $g.DrawImage\($img, 0, 0, $w, $h\); $enc = [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageCodecInfo]::GetImageEncoders\(\) | Where-Object { $_.MimeType -eq 'image/png' }; $bmp.Save\($dst, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); Write-Host 'Done'")
